summary:
The infant was born extremely prematurely (<30 weeks) and has risk factors associated with retinopathy of prematurity (ROP). Therefore, this case warrants early ophthalmologic evaluation as part of standard screening protocols for premature newborns.

Second sentence must state clearly that routine or prompt eye examination by an ophthalmologist follows established guidelines because these vulnerable preterms are screened specifically for ROP during their NICU stay.

Final output will contain exactly two concise sentences without extra explanation.
